name: Apple Cheddar Wontons
recipeInstructions:
Core the apples and cut into small pieces. Mix the brown sugar and cinnamon together and set aside.
1. Preheat the peanut or vegetable oil in a deep fryer or other pan used for deep frying.
2. Wrap a piece of apple and a cube of cheddar cheese in a wonton skin and seal according to the directions on the package.
3. Deep fry until golden brown.
4. Coat with the brown sugar - cinnamon mixture and serve. This is good served hot or cold.
